channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: What Can AI See About You Right Now? I Built a Scanner to Find Out
item.description: The Uncomfortable Truth Right now, on the machine you are reading this on, there are probably dozens of secrets sitting in plain sight. Your OPENAI_API_KEY is set as an environment variable —...

item.title: NotebookLM can now summarize research in ‘cinematic’ video overviews
item.description: Google's NotebookLM can now turn users' research and notes into fully animated "cinematic" videos, going a step further than the original video overview feature Google introduced last year....

item.title: Does that use a lot of energy?
item.description: Article URL: https://hannahritchie.github.io/energy-use-comparisons/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47253364 Points: 4 # Comments: 0

item.title: The new MacBook Air debuts with a $50 gift card as the M4 model hits its best price
item.description: Powered by the new M5 chip, Apple’s latest MacBook Airs are more powerful than ever with double the base storage (512GB), but they also cost $100 more than their predecessor. Fortunately, though,...

item.title: The world’s biggest automaker has one of the dirtiest supply chains: report
item.description: Tesla, Ford, and Volvo occupy the top three spots in a new ranking of 18 global automakers based on their efforts to eliminate carbon emissions, environmental harms, and human rights violations...

item.title: Async/Await no .NET 10: Eliminando o Overhead da State Machine
item.description: O .NET 10 trouxe melhorias significativas na programação assíncrona. Algumas são diretamente relacionadas ao async/await, enquanto outras otimizam o runtime de maneiras que beneficiam...

item.title: The View from RSS
item.description: Article URL: https://www.carolinecrampton.com/the-view-from-rss/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47253221 Points: 4 # Comments: 1

item.title: Share, Embed, and Curate Agent Sessions on DEV [Beta]
item.description: Authors can now upload Agent Session transcripts to their DEV account. Those transcripts can be curated, sliced up, shared publicly, and embedded into posts. This is a beta feature, and we are...

item.title: Console exclusives might be making a comeback
item.description: The near future of game consoles could look a lot like the past. Once a hallmark of the industry, over the last few years console-exclusive games have steadily become rare, as the likes of Sony...

item.title: Is Engineering Turning Into Personal Branding?
item.description: Over time a pattern becomes visible in how developer careers evolve. Some engineers are exceptionally capable but spend most of their time solving difficult problems within the boundaries of their...

item.title: Blue-Green Deployment on AWS: Step-by-Step Guide to Zero-Downtime Releases (2026 guide)
item.description: Your Deployment Just Took Down Production. Again. Here's How to Never Let That Happen. It was a Thursday afternoon. The kind where you're mentally halfway out the door, maybe already thinking...

item.title: Google Docs Is a Toy. Here's What Professionals Actually Need.
item.description: Google Docs works great for drafts, meeting notes, and quick sharing. The moment your work actually matters, its limitations become impossible to ignore. TL;DR: Google Docs is excellent at what it...

item.title: OrkaJS: The TypeScript Framework That Makes LLM Development Actually Simple
item.description: OrkaJS: The TypeScript Framework That Makes LLM Development Actually Simple If you've tried building an LLM-powered application recently, you know the pain. The ecosystem is fragmented, frameworks...

item.title: Synthetic Data and the Privacy Problem: Beyond Alice and Bob
item.description: The fixtures in this series have always been honest about what they were optimizing for. Posts 1 through 3 generated vendor CSV files designed to capture structural chaos: typos in column headers,...

item.title: Google’s AI-powered workspace is now available to more users in Search
item.description: Google is bringing Canvas to everyone in the US using AI Mode in Search. The feature opens up a dedicated workspace within its AI-powered search tool, allowing it to use the latest information...

item.title: Google’s Gemini rolls out Canvas in AI Mode to all US users
item.description: Canvas in AI Mode is available to U.S. users in English for creating plans, projects, apps, and more.

item.title: Decagon completes first tender offer at $4.5B valuation
item.description: The AI-powered customer support startup is the latest example of a fast-growing, young company that's providing employee liquidity.

item.title: Google isn’t waiting for a settlement — the 30 percent Android app store fee is dead
item.description: In November, Epic and Google jointly proposed a settlement that would change Android's fate globally without cracking open Google's Android monopoly quite the way it otherwise might. Today, Google...

item.title: Downdetector and Speedtest sold to Accenture for $1.2 billion
item.description: Downdetector and Speedtest - the free platforms that allow people on the web to quickly check internet speeds or see if an online platform may be down - will soon have a new owner. On Tuesday, the...

item.title: 149 Hacktivist DDoS Attacks Hit 110 Organizations in 16 Countries After Middle East Conflict
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of a surge in retaliatory hacktivist activity following the U.S.-Israel coordinated military campaign against Iran, codenamed Epic Fury and Roaring Lion. "The...

item.title: The US military is still using Claude — but defense-tech clients are fleeing
item.description: As the U.S. continues its aerial attack on Iran, Anthropic models are being used for many targeting decisions.

item.title: Honor’s Robot Phone is a bad robot, an interesting camera, and maybe your friend
item.description: After over four months of teasing, I've finally been able to see Honor's Robot Phone in action. And after all that, it looks pretty legit - just so long as you weren't actually expecting a robot....

item.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
item.description: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.

item.title: MacBook Neo versus an old MacBook Air: good luck
item.description: My first thought when Apple announced the MacBook Neo today was "okay, but why not just get an older Air?" If you're thinking that too, you might be right. If you can find one. The Neo starts at...

item.title: Google faces wrongful death lawsuit after Gemini allegedly ‘coached’ man to die by suicide
item.description: A lawsuit filed on Wednesday accuses Google's Gemini AI chatbot of trapping 36-year-old Jonathan Gavalas in a "collapsing reality" that involved a series of violent missions, ultimately ending...

item.title: Father sues Google, claiming Gemini chatbot drove son into fatal delusion
item.description: A father is suing Google and Alphabet, alleging its Gemini chatbot reinforced his son’s delusional belief it was his AI wife and coached him toward suicide and a planned airport attack.

item.title: One startup’s pitch to provide more reliable AI answers: Crowdsource the chatbots
item.description: CollectivIQ looks to give users more accurate answers to their AI queries by showing them responses that pull information from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok — and up to 10 other models — all at...

item.title: Bridging the operational AI gap
item.description: The transformational potential of AI is already well established. Enterprise use cases are building momentum and organizations are transitioning from pilot projects to AI in production. Companies...

item.title: Coruna iOS Exploit Kit Uses 23 Exploits Across Five Chains Targeting iOS 13–17.2.1
item.description: Google said it identified a "new and powerful" exploit kit dubbed Coruna (aka CryptoWaters) targeting Apple iPhone models running iOS versions between 13.0 and 17.2.1. The exploit kit featured...

item.title: The Download: Earth’s rumblings, and AI for strikes on Iran
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Listen to Earth’s rumbling, secret soundtrack The boom of...
